offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects/month, the complexity of OSHA compliance reporting causes delays in project approvals. We automate report preparation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in preparing timely OSHA safety compliance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
